activation_manager.readiness_status: ACTIVATED_READY_FOR_DEV: signature ilja210620262303 recorded; refinement + 74 MTs + worktree (../wtc-native-editors-v1 on feat/WP-KERNEL-012, canonical main code + .GOV junction) all ready. Downstream coder/implementation may begin.

refinement.operator_request: Operator 2026-06-19 (original): rebuild the Obsidian + VS Code clones as native Rust Handshake tools with FULL feature parity to the existing React surfaces, interconnected with EACH OTHER and with CKC + Loom, hosted in the WP-KERNEL-011 native shell, reusing the existing Rust backend (no rewrite). As many MTs as needed, each executable by a small no-context local model; minimal governance paperwork. Operator 2026-06-21 (expansion): Handshake hosts Obsidian+VSCode parity under the Notes pillar (not stitched-on apps); the editors MUST also work together with CKC, FEMS, Loom and other pillars - if features or pillar interactions are missing, create extra microtasks. Continue the WP-KERNEL-011 GUI so every surface has a sensible worksurface; place the correct items in the settings menu and keep it structured. Create the WP worktree + backup so implementation can start in fresh sessions.

enrichment_decision.rationale: Editor parity + interconnection is packet-local execution detail anchored to existing durable law: CX-003-VIS / CX-004-VIS / CX-005-VIS (melt-together, handmade-owned, LLM co-creator), Product Reference Pillars 2/3/4/6/7/12/17/18-19, the existing FR-EVT-MEM-001..005 memory events (Master Spec 11.5.13), the existing MemoryPack/retrieval-capsule contract, the IMX force-multiplier edges (Appendix 12.6), and the WP-KERNEL-009 delivered React feature set as the parity baseline. No new durable product contract is introduced: parity catch-up mirrors features the React surfaces already shipped; FEMS/Stage/Calendar/Locus interop binds editors to ALREADY-normative pillars; GUI continuation + settings + manual reuse surfaces WP-011 already built. Per the default-to-NO rule, no Master Spec bump is required for this WP.
enrichment_decision.master_spec_bump: NONE (current SPEC_CURRENT = v02.195, already native-GUI per WP-011 enrichment).
enrichment_decision.reconciliation_debt: Three spec product-surface lags to reconcile in a LATER spec pass (NOT this WP): (a) Product Reference Tech Stack + Pillars 3/4 still name React/Tiptap/Monaco/Tauri while WP-011/012 deliver native Rust egui+egui_tiles+AccessKit+wgpu (no webview) - update once WP-012 lands. (b) Master Spec 10-product-surfaces (~lines 412/441/444) mandates DOCX import/export via AST + a dual RichView+Monaco StructuredTextView that WP-012 deliberately scopes OUT (export is HTML/MD/TXT/JSON per React parity) - parked to WP-KERNEL-014 stub; operator decision needed (do not silently drop). (c) FR-EVT family lists FR-EVT-002 (editor) for document/code edits while MT-036 emits via a 'system' event_type with a nested native_editor payload - confirm/reconcile the native-editor FR producer mapping.

scope_edges: IN: native parity rebuild of the VS-Code-class code editor (E1) + Obsidian/Notion-class rich-text/knowledge editor (E2/E3) + search surfaces (E4) to FULL parity with the WP-KERNEL-009 React baseline, hosted in the WP-011 shell.
IN: melt-together interconnection (E5) across the two editors + CKC + Loom (shared selection/clipboard/command bus, everything-is-a-Loom-block, unified undo, one event ledger).

IN (2026-06-21 expansion): FEMS interop (E9) - consume the retrieval capsule/MemoryPack inline + emit review-gated memory-write proposals; other-named-pillar interop (E10) - Stage/Calendar/Locus edges; WP-011 GUI worksurface continuation (E11) - wire the disabled editor menu/command/context-menu/status-bar placeholders to the real editors; structured settings + menu completion + manual (E12).
IN: backend reuse (E6) via existing handshake_core APIs; AccessKit model-vision/steering (E7); parity + interconnection proof suites (E8 + MT-065 FEMS proof + MT-074 other-pillar proof).

OUT: any backend rewrite (gaps are TYPED BLOCKERS, never in-WP backend edits); new future creative surfaces (photo editor, spreadsheet, mechanical engines, Tailor) - designed extension seams only (MT-036); new shell infrastructure (reuse WP-011, never fork).

OUT (parked to future-WP stubs): Notion-class typed page properties + relations/rollups + user-editable template engine -> WP-KERNEL-013; DOCX import/export via AST + dual RichView/Monaco StructuredTextView -> WP-KERNEL-014.

OUT: heavy non-editor pillar surfaces left as WP-011 placeholders that are NOT in the Notes/editor orbit (Atelier full, Inference Lab, Model Runtime, Swarm full, Kernel DCC, Visual Debugger) - their full builds remain their own pillar WPs; E11 only wires the editor-orbit placeholders.
assumptions: WP-KERNEL-011 shell (egui+egui_tiles+AccessKit+wgpu) is PASS and provides the pane registry, command bus, unified-undo seam, context-menu primitive (MT-019), status bar, settings dialog (PG-backed, MT-018), command palette, quick switcher, AccessKit id registry, and User Manual pane - confirmed in the WP-011 packet acceptance matrix.

The existing handshake_core exposes FEMS read (MemoryPack/pack) + review-gated proposal write, Stage route + artifact, Calendar events + activity-spans, and Locus WP/MT read endpoints; if any is absent each interop MT raises a TYPED BLOCKER with a visible empty-state rather than building backend.

Implementation lane is folded KERNEL_BUILDER, no ACP; KERNEL_BUILDER implements one unblocked MT at a time per Product Implementation Mode; validation topology INTEGRATION_VALIDATOR_BATCH_MT_THEN_SPEC_V1.
The legacy React app (app/src) stays as read-only parity reference until native parity is proven, then retired.
Storage is PostgreSQL/EventLedger only; SQLite is forbidden anywhere in these MTs.
All new editor code lives under src/frontend/** and tests/native_editors/**; no app/src or src/backend edits.

Per operator rule (2026-06-21): the WP worktree is created from main for the code side (with a gov_kernel .GOV junction) and is NEVER based on another WP's feature branch; this requires WP-KERNEL-011 to be merged into main first (see KEY blocker).
non_goals: DOCX import/export via AST and the dual RichView+Monaco StructuredTextView (future WP stub WP-KERNEL-014).
Notion-class typed page properties beyond title/tags, relations/rollups, and a user-editable template engine (future WP stub WP-KERNEL-013).
Building any future creative surface or mechanical engine; only the designed extension seams from MT-036 are honored.
Full builds of non-editor-orbit pillar surfaces (Atelier/Inference Lab/Model Runtime/Swarm/Kernel DCC/Visual Debugger) - own pillar WPs.
No Master Spec bump this WP; reconciliation debt is recorded, not enriched.

research_basis.implementation_alignment: Reuses the WP-011 toolkit decision (egui+egui_tiles+AccessKit+wgpu) and ropey/tree-sitter/cosmic-text already chosen in MT-001/011/012.
research_basis.external_research_status: RECONCILIATION_AGAINST_EXISTING_SPEC_PLUS_REACT_BASELINE_PLUS_GUI_DOC; no fresh external web research in the synthesis turn. Per Activation Manager protocol (internal/spec-anchored WP) external research set to local-truth-first. Broad current-field research remains the KERNEL_BUILDER's GLOBAL-RESEARCH gate before implementing each new primitive MT (esp. FEMS retrieval/proposal, LSP code-actions/rename, graph-control UX).

risks: Parity asserted vs proven: every new parity-gap MT must map to a passing native runtime proof in MT-044 (parity gate); the new MTs list MT-044 in blocks. Control: the MT-044 parity manifest must grow to include the new features.

FEMS/Stage/Calendar/Locus backend may not expose the assumed endpoints: each interop MT carries an explicit typed-blocker path + visible empty-state + no-silent-no-op test, so a backend gap surfaces as a blocker not a fake.

FEMS memory writes must NEVER be editor-direct commits: MT-064 enforces review-gated proposals only + a procedural-class review-gate test + a grep gate that no direct-commit call site exists; a direct-commit path is a red-team failure.

WP-011 substrate fork risk: E11/E12 MTs must reuse the existing menu/command/undo/context-menu/status-bar/settings/manual paths; tests assert routing through the SAME shared state-mutation paths and forbid new infra forks.
Multi-cursor correctness on line-edit transforms (MT-051): per-cursor application + coalesced undo tested to avoid corruption under N cursors.
Word-wrap breaks MT-002 virtualization math: MT-054 tests visible-row math under wrap so large-file performance (MT-045) does not regress.
Swarm steerability regressions: every new control AccessKit-addressable; MT-065/MT-074 require an out-of-process agent to drive each surface by stable id.
Scope creep into Notion database / DOCX: explicitly parked as future-WP stubs with open questions, not authored as MTs.
minimum_controls: Parity gate (MT-044) extended to cover every new VS Code/Obsidian parity MT; no placeholders/mocks for spec-required runtime behavior.
Each interop MT has a typed-blocker path + visible empty-state + no-silent-no-op test; zero backend edits; zero SQLite.
MT-064 grep gate: no direct memory-commit call site; review_gated hard-true for Procedural.
E11/E12 tests assert reuse of WP-011 shared state-mutation paths (no fork).
MT-065 (FEMS) + MT-074 (Stage/Calendar/Locus) interop proof suites prove edges by real scenario, not assertion.
